reason: Cross-child acceptance + privacy red-lines to verify against: no content in any payload, single toggle gates both tools, dependency budget, anonymous only.
This task's own acceptance criteria — verify every diagnostic + adoption signal fires, toggle-off suppresses all emission, activation fires once, one new SPM dep.
Verify conventions were followed: Makefile test-<name> rule added to test-all, .xcstrings appended not reordered, Info.plist plutil -lint clean, single import-boundary.
